skills.description: Query the DatoCMS Content Delivery API (CDA) — a read-only GraphQL API — using the official @datocms/cda-client TypeScript/JavaScript library. Use when users want to fetch records, filter and paginate collections, query localized content with fallbacks, work with modular content blocks, render structured text (DAST), display responsive images with imgix transformations and placeholders, handle SEO meta tags and favicons, query Mux videos, use draft/preview mode, target sandbox environments, integrate cache tags for CDN invalidation, enable Content Link for visual editing, or perform any client-side or server-side DatoCMS content reading operation. Also use when users want to set up type generation for fully typed queries using gql.tada or GraphQL Code Generator.

queries.query: how do i filter datocms records by a date field in graphql? i want to show only events that haven't happened yet, sorted by date ascending

I'm building a portfolio site with DatoCMS. Each project has modular content blocks — a text block, an image gallery block, and a video embed block. How do I query these with the CDA and render them with the right components?

I need to pull all blog posts from my DatoCMS project and display them on my Next.js site. They have a title, slug, cover image, and a rich text body. Can you write the GraphQL query and the page component?

my datocms images are loading slow. i heard there's some responsive image stuff with srcset and blur-up placeholders? im using react-datocms. can you help me set up the image component with the right graphql fragment?

We have a multilingual DatoCMS site (English, French, German). I need to query the CDA with locale fallbacks so that if a field isn't translated to French it falls back to English. What does the query look like?

I need to render structured text from DatoCMS that contains inline records and block records. The structured text has embedded 'call to action' blocks and links to other records. Using @datocms/cda-client and react-datocms StructuredText component.
Can you help me set up the SEO meta tags from DatoCMS? I need to query the _seoMetaTags field and the site favicon, then render them in my Next.js app's head/metadata.

I want to paginate through a collection of 500+ articles from DatoCMS CDA. What's the right way to do cursor-based pagination with the GraphQL API? I need to show 12 per page with a 'load more' button.
how do I query datocms to get all records that match a full-text search? the user types in a search bar and i need to search across title and body fields
I need to create a new blog post programmatically in DatoCMS with a title, slug, body, and a cover image upload. This is for a migration script that imports 200 posts from our old WordPress database.
How do I set up the DatoCMS Web Previews plugin so editors can click 'open preview' in the CMS and see the draft version of the page on my Next.js site?
I want to build a custom DatoCMS plugin that adds a sidebar panel showing related content suggestions. It should use the datocms-plugin-sdk connect() function with renderItemFormSidebar.

can you help me write a datocms migration script using the CLI? I need to create a new model called 'Event' with title, date, location, and description fields, then run the migration on my sandbox environment
I need to delete all records from the 'old_articles' model in DatoCMS. There are about 3000 of them. Can you write a script using the CMA client that paginates through them and deletes each one?
Help me set up draft mode for my Nuxt 3 site with DatoCMS. I need the enable/disable endpoints and the executeQuery wrapper that switches between published and draft tokens.
I need to build a custom color picker field extension for DatoCMS using the plugin SDK. It should show a color wheel and save the hex value to the field.
Can you set up real-time content updates on my SvelteKit site? When an editor changes content in DatoCMS, I want the preview page to update instantly without refreshing.
I'm setting up a Supabase project with a PostgreSQL database. Can you help me write GraphQL queries using Hasura to fetch user profiles with their recent posts?
how do i set up cache tag invalidation for my DatoCMS next.js site? when content changes i want to revalidate only the affected pages, not the whole site

skills.description: Work with the DatoCMS CLI tool (@datocms/cli) for migration scripting, environment management, maintenance mode, content importing, and project configuration. Use when users want to create or run migration scripts, manage sandbox environments from the command line, toggle maintenance mode, set up CLI profiles and configuration, import content from WordPress or Contentful, or orchestrate deployment workflows with environment forking and promotion.

queries.query: I need to create a DatoCMS migration script that adds a new 'Event' model with title, date, location, and description fields. How do I scaffold the migration and run it on my sandbox environment?
can you help me set up the datocms CLI in my project? i need to configure profiles for my production and staging environments so i can run migrations against both
I want to import our WordPress blog content into DatoCMS. We have about 400 posts with featured images and categories. Can you walk me through using the datocms CLI import command?
How do I run my DatoCMS migrations in CI/CD? I want to fork the primary environment, apply pending migrations, and promote it if they pass. Using GitHub Actions.

i need to write a migration that renames a field from 'author_name' to 'author' on my blog_post model, and also changes its field type from single-line string to a link field pointing to the Author model
How do I list all DatoCMS environments from the CLI and delete old sandbox environments that are no longer needed? We have like 15 stale sandbox envs cluttering things up.
I want to toggle maintenance mode on my DatoCMS project using the CLI before running a big migration, then turn it off when done. How does that work?

can you help me write a migration script that creates a new block model for an 'image gallery' with images (gallery field) and caption (string), then adds it as an allowed block in the page model's content field?
We're moving from Contentful to DatoCMS. The CLI has an import command for Contentful, right? How do I export from Contentful and import everything including assets and content types?
I need to fetch all blog posts from DatoCMS using GraphQL and display them in my Next.js app. Can you write the query with filtering and pagination?
How do I create 500 records programmatically in DatoCMS using the CMA client? I have a JSON file with product data that I want to import via a Node.js script.
I want to build a sidebar plugin for DatoCMS that shows SEO suggestions. How do I use the plugin SDK to create a sidebar panel?
Help me set up draft mode for my Astro site with DatoCMS. I need the enable/disable endpoints and the executeQuery wrapper.
How do I render DatoCMS structured text in my React component? I need to handle inline records, block records, and custom marks using the StructuredText component.
I need to upload 200 images to DatoCMS programmatically from S3 URLs and assign them to product records using the CMA client.
can you help me set up real-time content updates for my DatoCMS Next.js site? i want the preview to update live when editors change content
How do I set up a Rails migration to add a new column to my PostgreSQL users table? I need to add email_verified boolean with a default of false.
I need to set up TypeScript type generation for my DatoCMS GraphQL queries using gql.tada. How do I configure it?

skills.description: Interact with the DatoCMS Content Management API (CMA) using the official TypeScript/JavaScript REST clients. Use when users want to create, read, update, or delete records (items), manage uploads and assets, define or modify models and fields (schema), work with environments (fork, promote), configure webhooks and build triggers, manage roles and API tokens, schedule publication or unpublication, handle localized content, build modular content with blocks and structured text, paginate and filter records, write migration and seeding scripts, or generate TypeScript types from your DatoCMS schema for type-safe record operations. Covers the most commonly used CMA resources — records, uploads, schema, environments, webhooks, access control, scheduling, and workflows.

queries.query: I need to create a new blog post in DatoCMS programmatically using the CMA client. The model has title (string), slug (slug), body (structured text), and published_date (date) fields. Can you write the script?
we're migrating 500 products from a CSV file into DatoCMS. each product has a name, price, description, and an image URL that needs to be uploaded as a DatoCMS asset. can you build the import script?
How do I update a record's structured text field via the CMA? I need to programmatically set the body of an article to include headings, paragraphs, and an inline block record reference.

I need to create a new model called 'Team Member' in DatoCMS using the CMA client. It should have fields: name (string), role (string), bio (structured text), photo (file), and a link to a 'Department' model.
can you help me paginate through all the records in my 'article' model? there are about 2000 of them and i need to export them to a JSON file. using @datocms/cma-client-node

I need to upload images to DatoCMS from URLs, set their alt text and title metadata, and then assign them to records. Some images are already in the media library so I should check for duplicates first.
How do I fork a DatoCMS environment, make some schema changes (add a new field to the blog_post model), and then promote it to primary? Using the CMA client programmatically.
I want to set up a webhook in DatoCMS that triggers when any record is published. Can you show me how to create the webhook configuration using the CMA client?
need to bulk update the SEO fields on about 300 product records in datocms. want to set the meta description to a template based on the product name and category. using the cma client
I need to query all blog posts from DatoCMS and display them on my React site. They have a title, cover image, and body. Can you write the GraphQL query for the Content Delivery API?
Can you help me render the responsive image component from react-datocms? I want blur-up placeholders and srcset for my DatoCMS images.
I want to build a custom sidebar plugin for DatoCMS that shows word count and reading time. How do I use the plugin SDK's renderItemFormSidebar hook?
can you help me write a migration script using the datocms CLI? I need to create a new model with datocms migrations:new and then run it on my sandbox env
How do I set up draft mode for my Next.js App Router site with DatoCMS? I need the enable/disable route handlers and the token-switching executeQuery wrapper.
I need to set up DatoCMS Content Link so editors can click on content in the preview and jump to the right record in the CMS. How do I add the stega encoding?
Help me set up the DatoCMS Web Previews plugin integration. I need a preview-links endpoint in my Nuxt app that returns the correct URL for each record type.
I'm building a Prisma schema for my PostgreSQL database. I need models for User, Post, and Comment with proper relations. Can you help?
How do I configure cache tag invalidation in my SvelteKit site so that when DatoCMS content changes, only the relevant pages get purged from Cloudflare's cache?

skills.description: DatoCMS front-end integrations for existing projects. Covers two domains: (1) Draft mode setup — authenticated endpoints with dual-token architecture, Web Previews plugin integration, Content Link visual editing setup, and real-time update subscriptions for Next.js (App Router), Nuxt, SvelteKit, and Astro. (2) React, Vue, Svelte, and Astro component/hook/store usage from react-datocms, vue-datocms, @datocms/svelte, and @datocms/astro — responsive images, structured text rendering, video player (React/Vue/Svelte only), SEO/meta tag utilities, real-time subscriptions, Content Link visual editing (<ContentLink>), and site search (useSiteSearch, React/Vue only). Use when users want to set up draft mode, web previews, content link, real-time updates, display DatoCMS images/video, render structured text, handle SEO meta tags, build search UIs, or enable visual editing in React-based, Vue-based, Svelte-based, or Astro projects.

queries.query: I need to set up draft mode for my Next.js App Router site with DatoCMS. I want enable/disable route handlers, a dual-token executeQuery wrapper, and the cookie-based draft detection. Can you generate all the files?

I'm building a Nuxt 3 site with DatoCMS and I need to set up the Web Previews plugin integration. Editors should be able to click 'Open preview' in the CMS and see the draft page. I need the preview-links API endpoint.
how do i use the react-datocms Image component to show responsive images with blur-up placeholders? i have the graphql fragment but im not sure how to wire it up in my Next.js page component
Can you help me set up Content Link for my SvelteKit site? I want editors in draft mode to be able to click on content elements and jump directly to the corresponding record in DatoCMS for editing.

I need real-time content updates on my Astro site when in draft mode. When an editor changes content in DatoCMS, the preview page should update immediately without a page refresh. Using SSE subscriptions.

I want to use the @datocms/svelte package to render responsive images and video players in my SvelteKit app. Can you show me how to import and use the Image and VideoPlayer components?

Setting up my Astro site with DatoCMS. I need the executeQuery helper to fetch content, and I want to handle both published and draft content based on whether draft mode is active. Using @datocms/astro.
How do I set up cache tag invalidation for my Next.js site with DatoCMS? I want granular revalidation so when a blog post changes, only that page gets revalidated, not the entire site.

How do I query all blog posts from DatoCMS using the Content Delivery API GraphQL endpoint? I need filtering by category and cursor-based pagination.
I want to build a custom field extension plugin for DatoCMS that renders a map picker. The editor clicks on a map to select coordinates. Using the plugin SDK connect() function.
can you help me write a datocms migration script that adds a 'featured' boolean field to my article model and sets it to true for the 10 most recent articles?
I need to upload images to DatoCMS from external URLs, set alt text, and link them to product records. Using the CMA client's uploads API.
How do I fork my DatoCMS environment, make schema changes via the CMA, and then promote it to primary? I want to do this in a CI pipeline.
I'm building a React app with Tailwind CSS and need to create a responsive navigation component with a mobile hamburger menu. No CMS involved, just pure frontend.
Can you help me set up a Strapi headless CMS with Next.js? I need to fetch content from Strapi's REST API and display it in my pages.

Use when users want to create or modify a DatoCMS plugin, work with the connect() function, field extensions, sidebar panels, custom pages, dropdown actions, asset sources, lifecycle hooks, modals, config screens, inspectors, outlets, upload sidebars, record presentation, structured text customization, or any plugin SDK hooks.

I need to build a DatoCMS plugin with a custom page that shows an analytics dashboard. It should appear in the main navigation and fetch data from our API. Using renderPage hook and the connect() function.

excluded_skills.datocms-setup: Command-style orchestration skill tracked by canonical fixtures but excluded from the published assistant-run snapshot.
